introSection: Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA. It is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma and opened on April 30, 1999.

sections.title: Elements
sections.content: Boomerang has three physical inversions: a cobra roll, and a vertical loop. The train travels through these inversions both forward and backward and thus riders are inverted six times.

fullText:
Boomerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA. It is a Boomerang installation from Vekoma and opened on April 30, 1999.



Boomerang has three physical inversions: a cobra roll, and a vertical loop. The train travels through these inversions both forward and backward and thus riders are inverted six times.

Yellow track and purple supports.
